## Checklist

- [ ] Plugin has `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` with name, version, description
- [ ] Plugin has at least one component (agent, skill, hook, or command)
- [ ] Ran `bash scripts/validate-plugin.sh plugins/my-plugin` successfully
- [ ] Updated marketplace.json if adding a new plugin
- [ ] Tested in a Claude Code session
